bossNegEffects.air: The Air curse gives the boss Aerial and Agile while the Air Orb is absent.  Be warned -- these effects lock in when the boss battle begins.
bossNegEffects.dark: The Dark curse confounds Hints while the Dark Orb is absent.
bossNegEffects.earth: The Earth curse gives the boss Enduring and Sturdy while the Earth Orb is absent.  Be warned -- Sturdy locks in when the boss battle begins.  Enduring may be removed later.
bossNegEffects.fire: The Fire curse gives the boss Cursed and Stunning while the Fire Orb is absent.  Be warned -- these effects lock in when the boss battle begins!
bossNegEffects.light: The Light curse confounds Hints while the Light Orb is absent.
bossNegEffects.metal: The Metal curse steals weaponry while the Metal Orb is absent.
bossNegEffects.soul: The Soul curse prevents Collect while the Soul Orb is absent.
bossNegEffects.water: The Water curse gives the boss Camouflage and Taunt while the Water Orb is absent.  Be warned -- Taunt locks in when the boss battle begins.  Camouflage may be removed later.
bossNegEffects.wood: The Wood curse prevents Release while the Wood Orb is absent.

A1.details: The mighty shadow dragon Veshan, usurper of this realm.  Deposing him is your final goal.
A1.name: Veshan
A1.rules: The dragon's powers are enhanced by the magical orbs.  Each orb gathered weakens his influence.

discord_490200954730446849_adv_1.name: Long name ha ver the long

A2.name: Foresight
A2.rules: You are allowed to hint 5 more starting items and 5 more starting locations than usual for this challenge.  Unlike normal, you *are* allowed to hint your primary macguffin as part of this.  Hints are turned off during the challenge itself.

B1.rules: This tile is Bifurcated.  Room 1 has Release On, Collect Off.  Room 2 has Release Off, Collect On.

B5.name: Speedrun
B5.rules: This world has reduced base stats compared to normal.  If it is completed within 48 hours, it is worth +50 XP and +75 Gold.  This reward goes down by 10 XP/15 Gold every 24 hours after that.  After 7 days, it will no longer have a bonus associated with it.

E2.details: The best things in life are free.
E2.name: Freemium
E2.rules: This world has 5 public free Archipelago-only games attached to it.  When 2 of these have goaled, Collect will be turned on.  When 4 of these have goaled, Release will be turned on.

slots.name: MegaPonyNeow

E3.details: The bridge leading out of town is being guarded by a troll, who demands a toll to let travelers pass. Not wanting to fight such a fearsome foe this early in the adventure, you agree.
E3.name: The Troll's Toll
E3.rules: Each slot must have at least 100 Coins in Locations that can be paid to the troll. After reviewing the YAML, the admin will note the coins required for each slot's toll; the troll is greedy, and will require a majority of your coins to be paid. Release is available on a per-slot basis once that slot has goaled and paid its toll.

statusNote.text:
Bi needs two more Chaos Emeralds.
Scry needs two more Epitaph Pieces and Monicle.
Tom needs at least six  more squares to fill four more cards.

F4.details: The nearby towns want to encourage tourism by promoting a challenge.
F4.name: Tourism
F4.rules: This world has an Any Game Tasks (Meta KMK) as a public slot.  Players will be asked to submit pictures accomplishing these tasks using the key phrase "Tourist" that meet the challenges on this world.  Release will be turned on when Tourist goals.

G5.name: Déjà vu
G5.rules: This world will be played twice.  The first time, release is off.  The second time, release is on.
